description: Refactor request. type=refactor, effort=l (needs breakdown), priority=p3.

issue.title: [Refactor] Replace ad-hoc URL params in web routes with TanStack Router's typed params
issue.body:
Right now we read URL params via `useSearch()` and parse them by hand in `apps/web/src/routes/`. With TanStack Router 1.167 we get typed search params via `validateSearch` — let's migrate.

Files I want to touch:
- `apps/web/src/routes/index.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/routes/settings.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/lib/orpc.ts`

This is a cross-cutting change. Probably a week of work. I want a plan before anyone starts.

expected.rationale: Refactor that needs breakdown — Tech Lead should scope before pickup
